title: Methodology
intro: To leverage technical advantages while maintaining vigilant cost control we collaborate with leadership, management, and technical teams to create strategy and allocate budget for the best technical solutions.
body:
Methodology is where strategic intent becomes an operating model teams can actually use. ETI works with leadership, managers, and delivery teams to shape governance, planning cadence, communication patterns, and decision paths that support both control and momentum.

## How methodology supports execution

- Translate priorities into a practical operating model.
- Define roles, ownership, governance, and escalation paths.
- Build delivery structures that reduce confusion and improve pace.
- Keep cost, quality, and accountability visible as the work moves.

## Why it matters

Without a working methodology, even strong strategy breaks down under delivery pressure. Teams lose clarity, decisions slow down, and the original business intent gets diluted. ETI helps organizations create a way of working that keeps complex initiatives coherent from planning through implementation.

## Continue the journey

Methodology should connect both backward to strategic direction and forward to delivery.

- Return to [Strategy](/strategy)
- Continue to [Execution](/execution)
